name: get_exchange_rate
description: Retrieve the current or historical mid-market exchange rate between two currencies. Wise uses the real mid-market rate without hidden markups. You can optionally specify a date for historical rates.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the source currency.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the target currency.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for historical rate lookup. If omitted, returns the current rate.
